description: Balanced adaptive governance across learning flexibility coordination knowledge legitimacy accountability equity and implementation burden.
Prioritizes monitoring feedback institutional memory after-action implementation and evidence-based rule revision.
Prioritizes adaptive rules decision triggers legal revision pathways and capacity to change course.
Prioritizes scientific local Indigenous practitioner and lived knowledge integration.
Prioritizes trust transparency fairness participation and public consent.
Prioritizes vulnerable groups rights safeguards participation and unequal-burden reduction.
Penalizes higher implementation burden when administrative finance or political bandwidth is constrained.
